behavior.approval_checkpoint: Publishing is blocked unless approval.required=false or approval.approved=true.
behavior.parallel_production: ad-designer, scriptwriter, and page-designer are orchestrated as logical parallel branches with structured branch statuses.
behavior.bounded_repair: When publish attempt 1 fails and repair is enabled, one bounded repair cycle executes before publish attempt 2.

notes: Workflow enforces shared schema hard-failure handling before runtime job creation.
Workflow writes explicit state transitions and structured status updates to the runtime job record.
Final webhook response contains structured status updates and publish/repair outcome flags.
